raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX I called XXXX to book a flight. I cancelled this booking the same day XXXX XXXX, however I was charged on my credit card on the XXXX of XX/XX/XXXX for the cancelled flight. I contacted XXXX XXXX of XXXX I was told by XXXX that I has been refunded. 

I received an email from XXXX to remind me of my cancelled flight. When I received this email, I called XXXX immediately. I could not fly on XXXX I had to travel using XXXX they did not fly to the destination I was going, this is why I cancelled my flight with XXXX originally. 
I called my credit card company on XX/XX/XXXX. Barclay 's stated I was charged by XXXX XXXX for the flight I did not take. 
I called XXXX back on XX/XX/XXXX and was told that they would sent a refund request {$540.00} it would take XXXX business to process. I was also told I would receive a status email of the refund I did not. 

On XX/XX/XXXX I called XXXX again ; I made them aware that I had not received the refund or an email. On XX/XX/XXXX I called Barclays again and informed them of the matter because the matter was over XXXX days. I had to contact the dispute department. 
I have not received a refund as of XX/XX/XXXX. 
XXXX has stolen my money and Barclays has allowed them to do it. I was a full refund.
